mapper.select: SELECT b.*, u.username FROM bill b LEFT JOIN `user` u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT b.*, u.username FROM bill b LEFT JOIN `user` u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.bill_no = #{billNo}
SELECT b.*, u.username FROM bill b LEFT JOIN `user` u ON b.user_id = u.id ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bill (bill_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, amount, bill_type, bill_status, remark) VALUES (#{billNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{billType}, #{billStatus}, #{remark})
